item.title: Libonex 2024 [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Libonex 2024 [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: srevilprod
item.itunes:summary:
Libonex 2024
(Arcade)
Il ne sert à rien d'essayer de s'en tenir à un Libonex alors que vous en auriez auparavant un autre. À quoi sert exactement cela ? Libonex exécuté correctement devrait vous aider à voir où va votre Libonex. Voici un certain nombre de suppositions. Le temps s'arrête lorsque vous avez Libonex. Quels plans avez-vous pour être plus efficace et productif lorsque vous traitez avec Libonex ? L'exemple ci-dessus montre que je ne savais pas vraiment ce que je visais en ce qui concerne cette conception. Cette bataille ne fait que commencer et elle va être féroce. Pour le dire autrement, voici un autre voyageur sur cette route vers cela. J'essaie de m'échapper de mon ornière Libonex.
Achetez maintenant ===> https://www.histoire-costume.fr/libonex/

https://libonex-capsules-fr.company.site/
https://libonexperformcapsules.quora.com/
https://libonexavis.sites.kaltura.com/
https://www.tournifyapp.com/live/libonexavis
https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/libonex-perform-capsules
https://libonex-capsules-fr.mywebselfsite.net/
https://sites.google.com/view/libonexavis/
https://sites.google.com/view/libonex-capsules/
https://groups.google.com/g/libonex-perform-capsules/c/0TSmvQtqdqw


[read more]

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Libonex 2024
(Arcade)
Il ne sert à rien d'essayer de s'en tenir à un Libonex alors que vous en auriez auparavant un autre. À quoi sert exactement cela ? Libonex exécuté correctement devrait vous aider à voir où va votre Libonex. Voici un certain nombre de suppositions. Le temps s'arrête lorsque vous avez Libonex. Quels plans avez-vous pour être plus efficace et productif lorsque vous traitez avec Libonex ? L'exemple ci-dessus montre que je ne savais pas vraiment ce que je visais en ce qui concerne cette conception. Cette bataille ne fait que commencer et elle va être féroce. Pour le dire autrement, voici un autre voyageur sur cette route vers cela. J'essaie de m'échapper de mon ornière Libonex.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)

The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: Webcamoid [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: Webcamoid [Webcam & Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: hipersayanx
item.itunes:summary:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]
item.description:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid, the ultimate webcam suite!
[b]Features[/b]

- Cross-platform (GNU/Linux, Windows)
- Take pictures and record videos with the webcam.
- Manages multiple webcams.
- Written in C++/Qt.
- Custom controls for each webcam.
- Add funny effects to the webcam.
- +60 effects available.
- Translated to many languages.
- Use custom network and local files as capture devices.
- Capture from desktop.
- Many recording formats.
- Virtual webcam support for feeding other programs.

[b]Installation and development[/b]

For the full installation and development guide go to:

https://github.com/webcamoid/webcamoid/wiki
[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: TrustVare OST Converter Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare OST Converter Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare OST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Recovering offline OST file databases and fixing erroneous OST files lets the TrustVare OST Converter Tool solution address any OST file corruption issues. Among other file formats, OST files can therefore be converted into PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, and MBOX. This application allows OST files from exported databases incorporated into Office 365 to be retrieved. Along with bulk conversion powers, this tool includes PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, MBOX, HTML, Office 365, and IMap servers as saving formats.
Those who find the highly interesting graphical user interface can examine the application in great detail. The tool saves a lot of time and effort by helping the user to concurrently convert many huge OST files. Among the OST file components this tool converts are contacts, calendars, emails, tasks, and other mailbox items.

Especially for its compatibility with all MS Outlook versions, including the most recent, the TrustVare OST Converter is unique. Moreover compatible with all Windows running computers, it is therefore really adaptable in terms of public needs.

Before deciding to buy the program, customers are given a free trial edition displaying tool features. All things considered, TrustVare OST Converter is a consistent and handy solution for Export Outlook OST File in a wide spectrum of document file types.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare OST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Recovering offline OST file databases and fixing erroneous OST files lets the TrustVare OST Converter Tool solution address any OST file corruption issues. Among other file formats, OST files can therefore be converted into PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, and MBOX. This application allows OST files from exported databases incorporated into Office 365 to be retrieved. Along with bulk conversion powers, this tool includes PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, MBOX, HTML, Office 365, and IMap servers as saving formats.
Those who find the highly interesting graphical user interface can examine the application in great detail. The tool saves a lot of time and effort by helping the user to concurrently convert many huge OST files. Among the OST file components this tool converts are contacts, calendars, emails, tasks, and other mailbox items.

Especially for its compatibility with all MS Outlook versions, including the most recent, the TrustVare OST Converter is unique. Moreover compatible with all Windows running computers, it is therefore really adaptable in terms of public needs.

Before deciding to buy the program, customers are given a free trial edition displaying tool features. All things considered, TrustVare OST Converter is a consistent and handy solution for Export Outlook OST File in a wide spectrum of document file types.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare OST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Recovering offline OST file databases and fixing erroneous OST files lets the TrustVare OST Converter Tool solution address any OST file corruption issues. Among other file formats, OST files can therefore be converted into PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, and MBOX. This application allows OST files from exported databases incorporated into Office 365 to be retrieved. Along with bulk conversion powers, this tool includes PST, MSG, EML, EMLX, MBOX, HTML, Office 365, and IMap servers as saving formats.
Those who find the highly interesting graphical user interface can examine the application in great detail. The tool saves a lot of time and effort by helping the user to concurrently convert many huge OST files. Among the OST file components this tool converts are contacts, calendars, emails, tasks, and other mailbox items.

Especially for its compatibility with all MS Outlook versions, including the most recent, the TrustVare OST Converter is unique. Moreover compatible with all Windows running computers, it is therefore really adaptable in terms of public needs.

Before deciding to buy the program, customers are given a free trial edition displaying tool features. All things considered, TrustVare OST Converter is a consistent and handy solution for Export Outlook OST File in a wide spectrum of document file types.
[read more]

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software is an effective tool crafted to ensure the smooth conversion of EML files into PST format. The strong capabilities and easy design of this application help users to have an excellent time. EML to PST Converter Tool is convert Bulk/Large Windows Live Mail into PST file format without any data loss. The software guarantees data integrity during the conversion process by preserving email original structure and information. With its advanced filtering choices, this utility lets users convert emails just depending on parameters like date range and assigned folders. It also offers a preview choice so consumers can look over the material before the conversion. Providing a customizable solution for email migration needs, the application is compatible with all versions of Windows and MS Outlook as well as EML files from many email clients including Windows Live Mail, Thunderbird, Apple Mail, etc. Users are free to investigate the app for free in the demo version.
A grate Features of the EML to PST Exporter: -

Perform a conversion from EML to PST.
There is no size restriction.
Exporting EML in bulk to Microsoft Outlook
Provide support for EML files across all email clients.
View the EML file together with its attachments.
All versions of Microsoft Outlook and Windows operating systems are compatible.
A filtering option

Visit here: https://www.trustvare.com/eml/pst/
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software is an effective tool crafted to ensure the smooth conversion of EML files into PST format. The strong capabilities and easy design of this application help users to have an excellent time. EML to PST Converter Tool is convert Bulk/Large Windows Live Mail into PST file format without any data loss. The software guarantees data integrity during the conversion process by preserving email original structure and information. With its advanced filtering choices, this utility lets users convert emails just depending on parameters like date range and assigned folders. It also offers a preview choice so consumers can look over the material before the conversion. Providing a customizable solution for email migration needs, the application is compatible with all versions of Windows and MS Outlook as well as EML files from many email clients including Windows Live Mail, Thunderbird, Apple Mail, etc. Users are free to investigate the app for free in the demo version.

A filtering option

Visit here: https://www.trustvare.com/eml/pst/
[read more]

The software guarantees data integrity during the conversion process by preserving email original structure and information. With its advanced filtering choices, this utility lets users convert emails just depending on parameters like date range and assigned folders. It also offers a preview choice so consumers can look over the material before the conversion. Providing a customizable solution for email migration needs, the application is compatible with all versions of Windows and MS Outlook as well as EML files from many email clients including Windows Live Mail, Thunderbird, Apple Mail, etc. Users are free to investigate the app for free in the demo version.

item.title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt6Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt6
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)

[b]Requirements[/b]

- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0

[b]Downloads[/b]

[read more]

Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt6Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt6
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]
[read more]
